Effective Date of Repeal, (b), , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–130, § 3(a)107 Stat. 1369Nov. 1, 1993“(a).—In GeneralEffective , the National Wool Act of 1954 ( et seq.) is repealed.December 31, 19957 U.S.C. 1781“(b).—ApplicationThe repeal made by subsection (a) [repealing this chapter and provisions set out as notes under sections 2, 1446, and 1781 of this title] shall apply to both the wool and mohair programs.”

Liability of Producers, , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–130, § 5107 Stat. 1369Nov. 1, 1993“A provision of this Act [amending sections 1782, 1783, and 1785 of this title, repealing sections 1781 to 1787 of this title, enacting provisions set out as notes under this section and , and repealing provisions set out as notes under sections 2, 1446, and 1781 of this title] may not affect the liability of any person under any provision of law as in effect before the effective date of the provision.”section 1447 of this title
